// SwarmedSettings: Reading order: below this line, every // key is documentation; the next block lists real settings in the same order. Swarmed adds call-for-help reinforcements (landscape/dungeon), CreatureEx champion variants, aura pulser and corpse exploiter tuning, and broadcast messages. Inside AuraPulser and CorpseExploiter: // lines first, then values (same order).
// LandscapeEnabled: When true, open-world creatures may roll for reinforcement spawns on death (see LandscapeChance and spawn counts).
// LandscapeChance: Base probability (0–1) for landscape call-for-help before online/landblock scaling.
// LandscapeSpawnMin: Minimum reinforcements spawned on a successful landscape roll.
// LandscapeSpawnMax: Maximum reinforcements spawned on a successful landscape roll.
// DungeonEnabled: When true, dungeon creatures may roll for reinforcement spawns (see DungeonChance and spawn counts).
// DungeonChance: Base probability (0–1) for dungeon call-for-help before scaling.
// DungeonSpawnMin: Minimum reinforcements on a successful dungeon roll.
// DungeonSpawnMax: Maximum reinforcements on a successful dungeon roll.
// ReinforcementHealthMin: Reinforcement max-health fraction lower bound (rolled per spawn).
// ReinforcementHealthMax: Reinforcement max-health fraction upper bound (rolled per spawn).
// HighHealthExemptionThreshold: Creatures with max HP above this skip ALL Swarmed alterations (CreatureEx, reinforcements, buddy spawns, variation) unless whitelisted.
// HighHealthExemptionWhitelist: WCIDs that ARE allowed to receive Swarmed alterations even if their max HP exceeds the threshold.
// ReinforcementXpBonusMin: XP bonus multiplier lower bound for reinforcement kills.
// ReinforcementXpBonusMax: XP bonus multiplier upper bound for reinforcement kills.
// ReinforcementGrowthEnabled: When true, every reinforcement generation grows by ReinforcementGrowthPercent compounded per depth (1.3^depth).
// ReinforcementGrowthPercent: Compounded growth per reinforcement generation (0.05 = 5% per spawn, so gen 2 = 10.25% stronger than original).
// ReinforcementGrowthMaxMultiplier: Cap on total reinforcement growth multiplier (e.g. 5.0 = 5× max).
// ReinforcementCreatureExDepthThreshold: Reinforcement chain depth at which CreatureEx champions start spawning (e.g. 3 = 3rd generation).
// ReinforcementCreatureExChanceAtThresh: Chance (0–1) to spawn CreatureEx once depth threshold is reached. 1.0 = always.
// CreatureChance: Base chance (0–1) for CreatureEx factory random champion replacement; can scale with online players when enabled.
// CreatureChanceScalesWithOnlinePlayers: When true, CreatureChance is increased by online player count × bonus, capped by CreatureChanceMaximumAfterScaling.
// CreatureChanceBonusPerOnlinePlayer: Added to CreatureChance per shard online player when scaling is enabled.
// CreatureChanceMaximumAfterScaling: Cap after online scaling; 0 or less is treated as 1.0.
// ReinforcementChanceScalesWithOnlinePl: When true, landscape/dungeon base chance gains ReinforcementChanceBonusPerOnlinePlayer × shard online count, capped by ReinforcementChanceMaximumAfterScaling.
// ReinforcementChanceBonusPerOnlinePlay: Per-online-player add to reinforcement base chance when that scaling path applies.
// ReinforcementChanceMaximumAfterScalin: Cap for reinforcement chance after online or landblock scaling; 0 or less treated as 1.
// ReinforcementChanceScalesWithLandbloc: When true and the dying creature has a CurrentLandblock, landblock player count scales chance (takes precedence over online scaling when both apply per mod logic).
// ReinforcementChanceBonusPerLandblockP: Per landblock player add to reinforcement base chance when landblock scaling applies.
// AuraPulser: AuraPulser CreatureEx: pulse radius, interval, damage fraction of pulser max health, max targets. Inside AuraPulser: // lines first, then values (same order).
// CorpseExploiter: CorpseExploiter CreatureEx: feed radius and heal fraction of victim max health. Inside CorpseExploiter: // lines first, then values (same order).
// CreatureFeatures: CreatureExType names enabled for random factory replacement (enum string names, JSON array).
// AllowPartialCreatureExTypeMatch: When true, /cex accepts a unique substring of a CreatureExType name (e.g. stomp → Stomper).
// CallForHelpMessages: Random broadcast templates when call-for-help triggers; {0} = creature name.

AuraPulser.// PulseRadiusMeters: Radius in meters for AuraPulser damage pulses.
AuraPulser.// DamageFractionOfPulserMaxHealth: Each pulse deals this fraction of the pulser creature's max health as damage (before other rules).

CorpseExploiter.// FeedRadiusMeters: Radius to find corpses to exploit for healing.
CorpseExploiter.// HealFractionOfVictimMaxHealth: Heal amount as a fraction of the victim corpse's max health.

CallForHelpMessages: The {0} cries out for help!
The {0} howls for its kin!
The {0} shrieks as it falls!
The {0} calls to its allies!
The {0} wails in desperation!
The {0} roars for reinforcement!
The {0} screeches a warning!
The {0} bellows in rage!
The {0} keens for aid!
The {0} summons its brethren!
The {0} yowls for backup!
The {0} bleats for help!
Upon seeing the {0} fall, reinforcements arrive swiftly!
The fall of the {0} draws more of its kind!
Reinforcements rush in as the {0} goes down!
More {0} pour in to avenge their fallen!
The death of the {0} has been noticed—allies close in!
As the {0} falls, its kin answer the call!
Reinforcements surge forward at the {0}'s demise!
The {0}'s fall signals others to join the fray!
New foes emerge where the {0} fell!
The {0} falls—and its brethren rise to take its place!
Word of the {0}'s defeat spreads; reinforcements converge!
No sooner does the {0} fall than more appear!
The {0} dies with a final cry—and the pack responds!
Reinforcements stream in where the {0} fell!
With the {0} down, its allies rush to the fight!
The {0} falls; from nearby, more close in!
Its death cry echoes—more {0} answer!
The fall of one {0} brings others running!
// ChaosModeReinforcementChanceScale: When effective chaos (killer or mean online FakeFloat 11013) > 1, multiply reinforcement chance by this × (factor ÷ 3), capped at 1. 0 = off.
// ReinforcementChaosBlendOnlineMean: Use max(killer chaos, mean online 11013) for reinforcement scaling.
// MaxReinforcementSpawnsPerMinute: Shard-wide cap on reinforcement creatures per rolling 60s (0 = unlimited).
// CreatureExChaosBoostScale: CreatureEx replacement chance scales with mean online chaos: extra mult ≈ (meanChaos - 1) × this, capped by CreatureExChaosBoostMaxMultiplier.
// CreatureExChaosBoostMaxMultiplier: Max CreatureEx chance multiplier from chaos (1 = off).
// BuddySpawns: Timed buddy spawning: idle landblocks spawn extra monsters.
// WildCreatureEx: Random CreatureEx champion spawns in the wild.
// CreatureVariation: Global stat/size variation on ALL creature spawns.
// DynamicMobScaling: Scale mob level/difficulty/loot/XP to nearby players within the same landblock.

DynamicMobScaling.// Enabled: When true, mobs scale to nearby player levels.
DynamicMobScaling.// SoloScalePercent: Percent of player level to scale to when solo (100 = exact match).
DynamicMobScaling.// GroupScalePercent: Percent of average group level to scale to (100 = exact match).
DynamicMobScaling.// MinScaleLevel: Minimum level a mob can be scaled to.
DynamicMobScaling.// MaxScaleLevel: Maximum level a mob can be scaled to. 0 = use server XP table max.
DynamicMobScaling.// LandscapeSoftCap: When true, landscape mobs have soft level caps based on world area tiers.
DynamicMobScaling.// LandscapeTierMaxLevels: Maximum scaled level per landscape tier. Tier 1 = starter areas, Tier 7 = endgame.
DynamicMobScaling.// XpScaleEnabled: When true, XP reward scales with the difference between scaled and base level.
DynamicMobScaling.// XpScalePercent: Percent of level difference to apply to XP (100 = full proportional scaling).
DynamicMobScaling.// OptOutProperty: PropertyBool used to track per-player opt-out. Shared with QOL /xp mob_scaling command.

// SpecialCreatureLoot: Guaranteed bonus loot for CreatureEx special mobs (salvage, uncommon+, random imbued gear).

SpecialCreatureLoot.// Enabled: When true, CreatureEx special mobs drop guaranteed bonus loot.
SpecialCreatureLoot.// SalvageCountMin: Minimum salvage items dropped by a special creature.
SpecialCreatureLoot.// SalvageCountMax: Maximum salvage items dropped by a special creature.
SpecialCreatureLoot.// UncommonPlusCountMin: Minimum uncommon+ items dropped by a special creature.
SpecialCreatureLoot.// UncommonPlusCountMax: Maximum uncommon+ items dropped by a special creature.
SpecialCreatureLoot.// ImbuedCountMin: Minimum random loot items (EmpyreanAlteration auto-imbued) dropped.
SpecialCreatureLoot.// ImbuedCountMax: Maximum random loot items (EmpyreanAlteration auto-imbued) dropped.

// DungeonPopulation: Maintains minimum living creatures in dungeon landblocks with players (template clones, not link respawn).

DungeonPopulation.// Enabled: When true, dungeon landblocks with players maintain a minimum creature population.
DungeonPopulation.// TargetMobCount: Desired living creatures per dungeon landblock; top-up spawns when count is below this.
DungeonPopulation.// CheckIntervalSeconds: How often to check and top-up dungeon populations.
DungeonPopulation.// MaxSpawnsPerTick: Maximum creatures spawned in a single tick to avoid spikes.
DungeonPopulation.// MinSpawnDistanceFromPlayer: Minimum distance from any player for new spawns (meters).
DungeonPopulation.// MaxSpawnDistanceFromPlayer: Maximum distance from players for new spawns (meters).
